title: In the Footsteps of the Chosen of Dragons
content:
{{Chapter Infobox
|image    = In the Footsteps of the Chosen of Dragons Chapter.png
|type     = World
|major    = 
|region   = Natlan
}}
'''In the Footsteps of the Chosen of Dragons''' is a [[World Quest]] Series in [[Natlan]].

==List of Quests==
* The following quests can be completed in any order:
** [[A Saurian Lover's Ordinary Days]]
** [[Feeling Like Fish Today!]]
** [[Friends of Fire and Water]] (5.2)
** [[Gifts and Gifts in Return]]
** [[Is "Intensity" Really the Key?]] (5.5)
** [[Lies and Promises]]
** [[Lights, Kamera, Action!]]
** [[Sauro-Vet's Dilemma]] (5.2)
** [[Special Friends]]
** [[Stones, Coconuts, and Saurian Traffickers]] (5.2)
** [[Tepetlisaurus Hide-and-Seek]]
** [[The Lone Isle Named Night]] (5.2)
** [[Treasures and Collectors]]
** [[Waiting For Seeds to Sprout]]
** [[Weighty Wings]]
* The following quest must be completed last:
** [[Someday, We All Must Walk Alone]] (5.5)
''*Keep in mind that to unlock the last quest, there are other hidden requirements and interactions around the map involving Little One that must be completed first. Reference the "Someday, We All Must Walk Alone" page for more details.''

==Summary==
[[Little One]] bears a mysterious and dangerous mark, the "[[Flamelord's Blessing]]". This mark is a form of powerful, ancestral magic that, as the saurian grows, causes it intense pain and leads to a loss of sanity, potentially turning it into a tyrant like [[Holawaqa Ngoubou]]. The Traveler and Paimon try to find a way to cleanse this curse so that Little One can grow up healthy and strong. The Traveler assists it in various activities around Natlan, ultimately leading to the discovery that the curse can only be removed at the heart of the [[Great Volcano of Tollan]], in a location called the [[Heart of the Sacred Mountain]].

The legend states that two tokens are needed to enter the cleansing fire within the volcano. The Traveler embarks on a journey to retrieve these tokens and eventually brings Little One to the volcano to perform the ritual. The curse is lifted, and Little One decides to go on its own adventures to fully experience freedom and its newfound connection to its dragon roots. The Traveler receives a smaller, permanent saurian pet for their [[Serenitea Pot]].
